extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: for matters against the Company, I counted 5 criminal, 31 tax and 17 statutory/regulatory proceedings; the 12 criminal and 23 tax proceedings by the Company were excluded, as were all promoter rows for the aggregate amount. For regulatory counting across listed entities, I added the 1 statutory/regulatory proceeding against the Promoters to the 17 against the Company, giving 18; tax counting is limited to the Company and subsidiaries, so the Promoters' 3 tax proceedings were excluded. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company is ₹235.57 million, with no separate subsidiaries row disclosed, converted to ₹23.557 crore (₹235.57 million ÷ 10); promoter amount was excluded. Contingent liabilities use the explicitly stated consolidated Total of ₹203.02 million as of December 31, 2024, converted to ₹20.302 crore (₹203.02 million ÷ 10), rather than summing line items. For the most recent full fiscal year, FY2024, the company-wide top-ten customer concentration is 50.77% of revenue from operations; the top-five percentage is summed from the five largest disclosed customer percentages (18.30% + 9.10% + 5.72% + 4.55% + 2.70% = 40.37%). The source tables use ₹ million, converted to crore at 1 crore = ₹10 million.
